summary: The test suite is exceptionally thorough and strictly adheres to the complex requirements. It includes a complete set of TDD-driven unit tests for all script logic (parsing, lookup, compliance, formatting) and a sophisticated meta-test harness (run_tests.py). This harness validates the GitHub Actions workflow structure, runs actionlint, orchestrates 'act' execution in a temporary git repository, captures output to the required artifact, and performs exact-string assertions on the CI logs to verify end-to-end behavior. Edge cases like malformed JSON and unsupported file types are well-covered.
